mapper.sql: select address_id, user_id, receiver_name, receiver_phone, province_code, province_name, city_code, city_name, district_code, district_name, detail_address, postal_code, is_default, address_status, create_time, update_time, remark from snow_address
mapper.select: where user_id = #{userId} and address_status = '0' and is_default = 'Y' order by update_time desc, address_id desc limit 1
mapper.update: update snow_address set is_default = 'N', update_time = sysdate() where user_id = #{userId} and address_status = '0' and is_default = 'Y'
